outcome_record.event_name: NRL Finals 2027 — Elimination Final: Canterbury vs Melbourne Storm

prediction.pre_match_note: NRL Elimination Final. Melbourne Storm — consistent finals performer, 3x recent Grand Finalists. Canterbury weaker finals record. Elimination final modifier × 1.25. Melbourne: superior defensive record (points against avg 14.8 vs Canterbury 18.2).

calibration_flags.notes: NRL finals defensive record as primary signal validated. Melbourne Storm's consistent finals pedigree correctly predicted in elimination context. Defensive average differential (14.8 vs 18.2) = 3.4 points per game advantage confirmed as predictive. 5th NRL calibration record.
